torchtitan-vanilla-parity-recipe.description: Checklist for preserving vanilla loss parity while validating speed/VRAM

torchtitan-vram-gap-triage.description: Methodical triage flow for residual VRAM gap after parity is achieved

torchtitan-soft-gating-parity-guardrails.description: Guardrails for soft-gating ports that are fast/low-memory but still numerically divergent

torchtitan-soft-gating-early-step-drift-.description: Detect and triage recurring step-9..11 soft-gating loss drift while preserving speed/VRAM gains

torchtitan-parity-harness-resilience.description: Rules to keep paired parity benchmarks valid when baseline teardown crashes occur after full completion

torchtitan-upstream-alignment-guardrail.description: Keep shared TorchTitan runtime upstream-first and move model quirks into adapters/hooks

torchtitan-dataset-trace-parity-gate.description: Require exact microbatch-stream alignment before interpreting loss parity deltas

torchtitan-checkpoint-isolation-parity-r.description: Prevent false parity failures by isolating dump folders and enforcing clean-start A/B runs

torchtitan-fsdp-posthook-collective-safe.description: Prevent FSDP hangs from rank-asymmetric post-step hook collectives and DTensor gathers

torchtitan-fsdp-ac-effective-batch-tunin.description: Select activation checkpointing mode by fixed-global-batch max-batch search and 100-step wall-clock/VRAM evidence

torchtitan-fsdp-tied-weight-grouping.description: Keep tied LM embedding and head weights inside one FSDP unit and verify parity separately from correctness

torchtitan-downstream-eval-raw-first-fal.description: Run downstream eval with raw lmms backend first and deterministic TorchTitan plugin fallback when local checkpoints are not full HF bundles

torchtitan-nanovlm-export-contract.description: Export TorchTitan nanoVLM checkpoints so they load directly in nanoVLM_main without manual patching

vlm-loss-parity-triangulation.description: Protocol to isolate loss mismatch after speed/VRAM goals are already satisfied
